description: The NamePlateInterface component is a favoritable type component that allows a user to set their custom nameplate for avatars they spawn into

fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned the dialouge
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the User ID of the person that spawned the dialogue
fields.IsInstance: Whether this dialogue was spawned by the game (true) or spawned from inventory (false)
fields.Username: The field to set with the username of the user who this nameplate has been spawned onto.
fields.UserID: The field to set with the UserID of the user who this nameplate has been spawned onto.
fields.IconURL: The field to set with the User profile icon of the user who this nameplate has been spawned onto.
fields.TargetUser: The field to set with the user this nameplate has been spawned onto.
fields.TargetUserRef: A user reference block to store info about the user this nameplate has been spawned onto.
fields.VoiceStream: The field to populate with the user voice stream of the user this nameplate has been spawned onto.
